import Link from "next/link"; import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"; import { Store, ShieldCheck, Zap, Globe, Leaf } from "lucide-react"; import { APP_NAME } from "@/lib/constants"; export default function BecomeASellerPage() { return (
{/* Hero Section */}

Grow Your Business with {APP_NAME}

Join Jharkhand's largest marketplace for flowers and plants. Reach thousands of customers in Daltonganj and beyond.

{/* Why Choose Us */}

Why sell on {APP_NAME}?

Hyper-Local Reach

Connect directly with customers in your city. Our hyper-local delivery ensures your plants stay fresh.

Secure Payments

Weekly automated settlements directly to your bank account. Transparent fee structure with no hidden charges.

Easy Dashboard

Powerful tools to manage your inventory, track orders, and monitor your business growth from any device.

{/* How it Works */}

Get started in 3 easy steps

1

Register Your Store

Fill out a simple form with your basic shop details and GST/PAN information.

2

Upload Products

Use our easy product uploader to add photos and descriptions for your plants and flowers.

3

Start Selling

Your products will go live on {APP_NAME}. Receive orders and let our riders handle the rest.

{/* CTA */}

Ready to reach more customers?

); }

import Link from "next/link"; import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server"; import { APP_NAME } from "@/lib/constants"; import { ArrowRight, Truck, CheckCircle, Sparkles, Heart, Leaf, ChevronRight, Droplets } from "lucide-react"; import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"; export default async function HomePage() { const supabase = await createClient(); // Fetch categories const { data: categories } = await supabase .from("categories") .select("*") .is("parent_id", null) .eq("is_active", true) .order("sort_order"); // Fetch Landscape const { data: Landscape } = await supabase .from("Landscape") .select("*") .eq("is_active", true) .order("sort_order") .limit(6); return (
{/* =========== Section 1: Hero Banner =========== */}
{/* Soft emerald aesthetic background */}
Daltonganj's Premium Botanic Archive

Nature's Art for
Your Living Space

Curate your sanctuary with our hand-selected indoor plants and fresh floral arrangements. Delivered with care.

{/* Image Placeholder representing lush Monstera */}
{/* Floating decorative elements */}

Same-Day

Delivery Available

{/* =========== Section 2: Categories (Horizontal Scroll) =========== */}

Curated Categories

Find exactly what your space needs

{(categories || []).map((cat) => { const icons: Record = { "flowers-bouquets": , "plants": , "pots-accessories": , }; return (
{icons[cat.slug] || }

{cat.name}

{cat.description}

Browse Collection
); })}
{/* =========== Section 3: Featured Collection =========== */}

The Featured Collection

Uncommon specimens and stunning arrangements handpicked by our botanists.

{[1, 2, 3, 4].map((i) => (
{/* Floating Action */}
+
))}
{/* =========== Section 4: Trust / Features =========== */}
{[ { icon: , title: "Same-Day Delivery", desc: "Swift, careful delivery across Daltonganj to ensure your plants arrive in pristine condition.", }, { icon: , title: "Freshness Guarantee", desc: "Sourced directly from premium growers. Only the healthiest specimens make it to your door.", }, { icon: , title: "Expert Curation", desc: "Every plant comes with detailed care instructions authored by our botanical experts.", }, ].map((item) => (
{item.icon}

{item.title}

{item.desc}

))}
{/* =========== Section 5: Landscape =========== */}

Botanical Consultations

Beyond delivery, {APP_NAME} offers expert garden design, maintenance, and event styling.

{(Landscape || []).map((svc) => (

{svc.name}

{svc.description}

{svc.price_starts_at && (
Starting at ₹{svc.price_starts_at.toLocaleString("en-IN")}
)}
))}
{/* =========== Section 6: Newsletter =========== */}

Join the Archive

Subscribe to receive weekly care tips, early access to rare specimens, and exclusive aesthetic inspiration.

); }

messages.message:
Error: Calling setState synchronously within an effect can trigger cascading renders

Effects are intended to synchronize state between React and external systems such as manually updating the DOM, state management libraries, or other platform APIs. In general, the body of an effect should do one or both of the following:
* Update external systems with the latest state from React.
* Subscribe for updates from some external system, calling setState in a callback function when external state changes.

Calling setState synchronously within an effect body causes cascading renders that can hurt performance, and is not recommended. (https://react.dev/learn/you-might-not-need-an-effect).

K:\Plantora\plantora\src\app\(public)\search\page.tsx:19:15
  17 |
  18 |   useEffect(() => {
> 19 |     if (!q) { setProducts([]); setIsLoading(false); return; }
     |               ^^^^^^^^^^^ Avoid calling setState() directly within an effect
  20 |     setIsLoading(true);
  21 |     fetch(`/api/search?q=${encodeURIComponent(q)}`)
  22 |       .then((r) => r.json())

This API returns functions which cannot be memoized without leading to stale UI. To prevent this, by default React Compiler will skip memoizing this component/hook. However, you may see issues if values from this API are passed to other components/hooks that are memoized.
